message:
feat(gateway): add agent health monitoring service (bd-1eq6)

Integrate ntm robot patterns for agent health monitoring:
- Create agent-health.service.ts with work detection, health scoring,
  and recommendation engine
- Integrate with agent.ts to track output samples for health analysis
- Export health status functions (getAgentHealthStatus, getFleetHealth,
  checkSafeToRestart)
- Fix exactOptionalPropertyTypes errors in reference/ntm files

Key features:
- Pattern-based work detection to avoid interrupting working agents
- Health scoring combining local state + provider usage
- Fleet-wide health summary with grade (A-F)
- Actionable recommendations (WAIT, RESTART, SEND_PROMPT, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
